title: Placentia Housing Market Update: July 2026
displayTitle: Placentia Sellers Need Sharper Pricing in July 2026

sourceNoteIntro: This Pulse uses CRMLS / InfoSparks data for Placentia, with the article read and chart defaulting to the Residential / Single family live MLS slice sourced from 7/5/2026. The broader Residential export is also available from 7/2/2026. It also uses official city, school, federal, state, and consumer sources for local due-diligence context. Use this as orientation, not a property valuation, legal opinion, lending quote, insurance opinion, school assignment, or forecast.

notes: Housing Market Pulse generated from structured manifest. Keyword intent angle: inventory competition versus pending demand. Primary keyword: Placentia housing market update. Google Keyword Planner seed queries: Placentia housing market; Placentia real estate market update; Placentia home prices July 2026; should I sell my house in Placentia; Placentia home selling market; Placentia homes for sale inventory; Placentia days on market; Placentia listing price; Placentia seller market; Placentia housing market 2026; Placentia market update sellers; Placentia median home price; are home prices dropping in Placentia; is now a good time to sell in Placentia. Research packet records editorial context. Visible avatar labels are prohibited and were not used in public page headings, badges, or category labels. Market metrics reviewed: medianSalePrice, averageSalePrice, averagePpsf, medianOriginalPrice, newListings, activeInventory, pendingSales, closedSales, monthsSupply, medianDaysOnMarket, averageDaysOnMarket. Missing/no-data metrics: closedVolume, totalClosedSides, medianLastListPrice, averageLastListPrice, medianShowsToContract, averageShowsToContract, showsPerListing.
